{
  "verses": [
    {
      "n": 1,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Mr tur bija weens sin- 
nams un netiklis Wihrs/ 
ar Wahrdü Seebus/ 
Bikra Dehls/ weens Wihrs Je- 
mini/ tas puhte ar Truñnetehin/ 
un fazzija: Mums Dailthas ne- 
wnd pee Dahwida/ nedß Man- 
tofchanas pee Jsaja Dehla/ tk- 
fatrs no Israëta lai eet sawâ 
Dsihwokli.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 2,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Tad gahje ikweens no J- 
sraëka no Dahwida nohßt See- 
bam Bikra Dehlam pakkat. Bet 
tee Wihrï no Juhda turrejahs 
pee sawa Kehnixa/ no Jardana 
lihds Jerusalentei.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 3,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Rad nu Dahwids fawâ 
Nammâ us Jerusalemi nahze/ 
tad nehine tas Kehninsch tahs 
definitis Seewas/ tawas leekas 
Seewas/ ko wiꞥſch bija painettis 
to Nammu fargaht/ un litte tahs 
kahdâ Nammâ fargaht/ un ap- 
kohe tahs/ un ne gahje wairs pee 
tahm. Un tahs bija atsflehgtas 
lihds fawai Mirschanas Deenai/ 
un dsihwoja par Atraitnchim.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 4,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Un tas Kehninsch fazzija 
us Amasu: Safauz man tohs
"
    },
    {
      "n": 5,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Tad gahje Amasus Ju- 
fafankt/ bet wiꞥſch katwejahs 
to noliftu Laiku/ ko tas winu 
bij lizzis.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 6,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Tad fazzija Dahwids 
Abisajn: Nu darrihs mu 
Seebus Bikra Dehls wa 
Fannuma/ ne ka Absalot 
Nemn tawa Kunga Kalpus/ 
dsennees winnam pakkat/ 
wiꞥſch jatchu stiprus Pilsf 
tus fewim ne atrohd/ un 
mums atranjahs.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 7,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Tad tsgabje Joaba W 
winnam pakkat/ ir tee Krcti 
Pleeti/ un wiſfi Warrence. 
isgahje no Jerusalemes/ See 
Bikra Dehlam pakkatdsihtee
"
    },
    {
      "n": 8,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Rad tee nu pee to leelu 
mini nahze/ kas Gibeonâ irr/ 
fastappe tohs Amasus/ bet 
abs bija apjohits pahr faw 
Drehbehm/ kas winnam 
Muggurâ/ un pahr tahm 
weena Johsta/ kur tas Soh 
bija peefets us winna Gurn 
tawas Maksts/ tas bija leht 
welkains un eebahschams.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 9,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Un Joabs fazzija us A 
su: Ar tew labbi klahjahs in 
Brahlis? Un Joabs fatweh 
labbo Rohku Amasa Ba 
winnu skuhpstiht.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 10,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Un Amasus ne farga 
no ta Sobbita/ kas Joaba 
kâ bija/ un tas eeduhte wi 
ar to Kungi/ ka winna Eek 
pee Semmes iskrattijahs/
"
    }
  ],
  "confidence": "high",
  "notes": ""
